## 1.1.0
*(2026-03-06)*

#### Features
* Related Landing Pages

## 1.0.27
*(2026-01-19)*

#### Fixed
* TypeError: Mirasvit\LandingPage\Repository\PageRepository::get(): Argument [#1]() ($id) must be of type int, string given

---

## 1.0.26
*(2026-01-05)*

#### Fixed
* FilterRepository::getByPageId(): Argument [#1]() ($pageId) must be of type int, string given

## 1.0.25
*(2025-11-11)*

#### Improvements
* Added canonical links

#### Fixed
* Sorting products by relevance if the search term is configured

## 1.0.24
*(2025-10-27)*

#### Fixed
* Issue related to the "Search term" condition

---

## 1.0.23
*(2025-09-10)*

#### Fixed
* More precise product filtering by search term
* Item name conflicts with BlogMX module in di.xml

---

## 1.0.22
*(2025-08-29)*

#### Fixed
* Filters added to the page in the settings are displayed on the landing page if the category filter display is enabled in the store

---

## 1.0.21
*(2025-07-28)*

#### Improvements
* A filter by subcategories has been added, if a parent category is selected in the page settings.
